name: issue_refund
description: Refund a captured payment back to the buyer. You can refund the full captured amount or a partial amount. Multiple partial refunds can be issued until the total reaches the original capture amount. The refund goes back to the buyer's original payment method. PayPal returns the fee for full refunds but retains it for partial refunds.

parameters.name: capture_id
parameters.description: The ID of the captured payment to refund (path parameter). This is the capture ID from the capture_payment response.

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: The refund amount. If omitted, a full refund is issued. For partial refunds, specify the currency_code and value.

parameters.name: note_to_payer
parameters.description: A note to the buyer explaining the refund. Maximum 255 characters.

parameters.name: invoice_id
parameters.description: Your own invoice or tracking ID for this refund.
